outcome: READY 8.1 — submission-ready methods contribution. Negatives push tightened FCR upper bound 12.8% (0/27) -> 3.1% (1/177).
what_was_built: CONFIRM governance engine + gate ladder (multiplicity+search-provenance, confound, confound-completeness, power, multiverse, cross-cohort replication)
agentic loop validated across 6 LLMs (governance robust on the false-confirm axis; anti-hallucination guard)
contract-validation layer (static checks + data-aware confound-completeness audit)
3 confirmed-positive domains (AD, schizophrenia, aging); real NeuroClaw baseline beaten; 150-negative stress benchmark
framing_discipline: the ~3.1% FCR bound is CONDITIONAL on the synthetic gate-targeted generator on local cohorts -- 'strong internal stress-test validation', NOT a real-world guarantee. 3 positive domains; cross-cohort-nonreplication family small (n=3).
future_work_for_top_tier: preregistered EXTERNAL adversarial benchmark of ~100-200 REAL claims across UNSEEN cohorts, frozen gates, run once -> 'field-level evidence' (vs current strong internal validation).
next_step: paper writeup with the calibrated framing (the loop is complete; the contribution is submission-ready).
